title: VIT University South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: VIT University South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
VIT University South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VIT University South Asia Partners:
VIT University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University South Asia Partners!
